channel.title: Dotnet on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnet on Pi Stack

item.title: BaGet vs NuGet.Server vs SlimGet: Self-Hosted NuGet Package Servers 2026
item.description: For .NET developers, NuGet is the standard package management system — the equivalent of npm for JavaScript or pip for Python. While the public nuget.org repository hosts hundreds of thousands of packages, organizations that build internal libraries, need offline access, or want to control exactly which packages reach their production systems require a self-hosted NuGet server.
